title: oldenlandia trachymenioides
intro: Oldenlandia trachymenioides, also known as "Hong Jing Tian" or "Hong Jing Teng," is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is a type of flowering plant native to China, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia trachymenioides include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of respiratory diseases, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia trachymenioides is often used in decoctions or infusions, and its extracts have been studied for potential use in the treatment of various diseases, including cancer and cardiovascular disorders.
